goal: Create a Python greeting module with a greet function and comprehensive test suite using pytest
scope: Create greet.py with a greet(name) function that returns 'Hello, <name>!'
Create test_greet.py with pytest test cases for the greet function
Ensure tests cover the basic functionality of the greet function
out_of_scope: Edge case handling (empty strings, special characters)

acceptance_criteria.check: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/Users/George/warden/tasks/t-feedback/workdir'); from greet import greet; assert greet('World') == 'Hello, World!'"
acceptance_criteria.expected: greet function returns correct formatted string
